task: Using only the embedded packet, screen ancillary-service bid records to (1) construct a decision table with baseline, mitigated, and sensitivity cases; (2) identify feasible bids under ramp-rate, capacity, and penalty constraints; (3) produce a recommended action that stays within the decision budget and improves the controlling metric by at least 10%; (4) mark contradictory or under-supported records as needs_review. Deliver a reproducible workbook or script (ancillary_bid_screen.xlsx) preserving intermediate calculations and formulas/executable logic, plus an expert-review memo (market_ops_note.md) with record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes (using sensitivity_shift_pct), and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
